column6: The workflow was easy to follow.
Input form labels may need revision.

column1: Which main task had the lowest completion?
column2: Check claim status (TU-03) and Open item detail (TU-07) failed (No). Users spent up to 175 seconds due to unclear layouts.

column1: Which screen or feature confused users most?
column2: Search/Filter and Status Tracking screens. Users wanted clearer category dropdowns and building names.

column1: Which requirement needs improvement before implementation?
column2: FR-08 (Status Display) and FR-15 (Privacy Control). User TU-12 reported that personal phone numbers were exposed publicly.

column1: Which MVP feature should be kept as must-have?
column2: Lost Item Report Form (FR-03) and Form Validation Messages (FR-10). They received top 5/5 scores from students.

column1: Decision: continue, revise, or pivot? Explain.
column2: Continue with Revision. The prototype has a high 83.33% success rate, but data masking and claim UI clarity must be revised.
